title: dacryodes excelsa
intro: Dacryodes excelsa, also known as the canarium or kalui tree, is a species of plant in the family Burseraceae that is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Dacryodes excelsa include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and extracts. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Dacryodes excelsa include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various ailments, making it a highly valued plant in the region.
